name: Apex Operations — AI Email Triage (Demo)
description:
README — Apex Operations AI Email Triage

WHAT THIS WORKFLOW DOES
Automatically triages incoming client emails using AI. For each new email: (1) classifies it into a category (new inquiry, client support, billing, escalation) and priority level, (2) retrieves the most relevant internal document from Google Drive, (3) drafts a professional reply grounded in that document and saves it to Gmail Drafts for human review, (4) logs the interaction to HubSpot (creating or updating the contact), and (5) notifies the correct Slack channel. No email is ever sent automatically.

PREREQUISITES
1. Gmail label: Create a label called 'Client Incoming' and apply it to inbound client emails (via Gmail filters). If this label does not exist, the trigger falls back to INBOX.
2. HubSpot Private App: Create a Private App at app.hubspot.com with scopes: crm.objects.contacts.read, crm.objects.contacts.write, crm.objects.notes.write. Copy the access token.
3. HubSpot custom property: Add a contact property named 'last_inquiry_type' (type: single-line text) under Settings > Properties.
4. Slack Bot: Create a Slack app with chat:write and chat:write.public scopes. Install to workspace. Ensure channels #sales, #account-management, and #admin exist.
5. Google Drive: Confirm folder ID 13LPG5a-EBYRlxurpI1b0P_1TsAOE5CCn contains your internal docs.
6. OpenAI: Obtain an API key with access to gpt-4o.

CREDENTIAL CONFIGURATION
In n8n, create the following credentials before activating:
- 'Gmail OAuth2' — Google OAuth2, scope: gmail + drive
- 'Google Drive OAuth2' — same OAuth app
- 'OpenAI API Key' — paste your sk- key
- 'HubSpot API Key' — paste your Private App token (hsp_...)
- 'Slack OAuth2' — paste your Slack Bot Token (xoxb-...)

HOW TO TEST
1. Import this workflow via Workflows > Import from JSON.
2. Re-select all credentials in each node (credential IDs are instance-specific).
3. Send a test email to the Gmail account with subject 'Test Inquiry' from a known address.
4. Execute manually (set Gmail Trigger to manual for first test).
5. Verify: Gmail Draft created, HubSpot contact created/updated, Slack message sent to correct channel.

NOTE: This is a portfolio demonstration workflow. All credential values are placeholders. Review all node parameters before production use.

parameters.content:
## 🗂️ Apex Operations — AI Email Triage

**What this workflow does:**
Polls Gmail every 5 min → AI classifies email → retrieves relevant internal doc → drafts reply → saves to Gmail Drafts → logs to HubSpot → notifies Slack.

**⚠️ No email is ever sent automatically.** All drafts require human review.

**Flow:**
Gmail Trigger → AI Categorize → Parse JSON → [IF new_inquiry → Services Doc] [ELSE → Category Doc] → Draft LLM → Gmail Draft → HubSpot Lookup → [IF exists → Update] [ELSE → Create] → Slack Switch → Slack Notify

## 🏢 HubSpot Find-or-Create Logic

The workflow searches HubSpot by sender email.

- **Contact found** → Create a note on the existing record + update `last_inquiry_type` property.
- **Contact not found** → Create a new contact (email, first name, last name, last_inquiry_type) then create the note.

Either way, the triage log (category, priority, summary, AI draft) is always written as a HubSpot note.

**Required scopes on your Private App:**
`crm.objects.contacts.read` · `crm.objects.contacts.write` · `crm.objects.notes.write`

## ✉️ Human Review Required

**This node saves a DRAFT — it does NOT send email.**

The AI-generated response is written to Gmail Drafts only. A team member must open Gmail, review the draft, edit as needed, and send manually.

The draft is labelled `[DRAFT FOR REVIEW]` at the top so it is never accidentally sent as-is.

## ✅ SETUP CHECKLIST

1. Create Gmail label **'Client Incoming'** and set up Gmail filters to apply it to inbound client emails.
2. Create **HubSpot Private App** with scopes: `crm.objects.contacts.read`, `crm.objects.contacts.write`, `crm.objects.notes.write`. Copy the access token.
3. Add custom HubSpot contact property **`last_inquiry_type`** (type: single-line text).
4. Create Slack channels: **#sales**, **#account-management**, **#admin**. Ensure bot is invited to each.
5. **Swap all DEMO_ placeholder credentials** for real values in every node.
6. Verify Google Drive folder ID **13LPG5a-EBYRlxurpI1b0P_1TsAOE5CCn** is accessible by your Drive OAuth account.
7. Set OpenAI API key with access to **gpt-4o**.

nodes.name: Gmail Trigger
nodes.description: Polls Gmail every 5 minutes for new client emails. Only processes emails not yet seen.

nodes.name: AI Categorize Email
nodes.description: Sends email to LLM for classification. Returns structured JSON with category, priority, summary, and routing.

messages.content: You are an email triage assistant for a B2B operations consulting firm. Analyze the email and return ONLY a valid JSON object with these exact fields: {"category": "new_inquiry|client_support|billing|escalation", "priority": "critical|high|medium|low", "summary": "max 15 words describing the request", "route_to": "sales|account_manager|admin"}. Return no other text.

nodes.name: Parse AI Response
nodes.description: Parses the LLM JSON response and merges triage fields with the original email data. Throws on malformed JSON so the error handler can catch it.

nodes.name: AI Parse Error — Slack Alert
nodes.description: Fires if the AI returns malformed JSON. Sends an alert to #admin for manual review. Workflow stops here for this execution.

nodes.name: Is New Inquiry?
nodes.description: Routes new inquiries to the Services Overview document. All other categories search for the most relevant internal document.

nodes.name: Get Services Overview Doc
nodes.description: Retrieves the Services Overview document to ground the AI draft for new inquiry emails.

nodes.name: Select Doc by Category
nodes.description: Selects the correct internal document based on email category. Billing emails get billing procedures; support/escalation emails get the FAQ.

nodes.name: Get Category Doc
nodes.description: Downloads the selected internal document. If no file matched the category, passes a fallback message to the draft LLM.

nodes.name: Merge Doc Paths
nodes.description: Reunites the new_inquiry and existing-client document paths into a single stream before the draft LLM call.

nodes.name: Prepare Doc Content
nodes.description: Extracts plain text from the Google Drive download response. Falls back to a standard message if no document was retrieved.

nodes.name: Draft Email Response
nodes.description: Drafts a professional email response grounded in internal documentation. Never sends — output goes to Gmail Drafts for human review.

messages.content: You are a professional consultant drafting a client email response on behalf of Apex Operations Consulting. Use only the internal documentation excerpt provided — do not invent facts not present in the document. Write in a warm, professional tone. Keep the response under 200 words. End with a clear next step or call to action. This draft will be reviewed by a human before sending — label the top of the response with [DRAFT FOR REVIEW].

nodes.name: Extract Draft Text
nodes.description: Extracts the draft text from the OpenAI response and merges it with triage data for downstream nodes.

nodes.name: Create Gmail Draft
nodes.description: Saves the AI-generated draft to Gmail Drafts. The team reviews and sends manually — no email is ever auto-sent.

nodes.name: HubSpot Search Contact
nodes.description: Looks up the sender in HubSpot by email address to find their existing contact record.

nodes.name: Extract Contact ID
nodes.description: Extracts the HubSpot contact ID from the search response. Sets contact_id to null if no match found or if API errored.

nodes.name: Contact Exists?
nodes.description: Determines whether to update an existing CRM contact or create a new one.

nodes.name: Update HubSpot Contact
nodes.description: Logs the email triage result and AI draft as a HubSpot note. Updates the contact's last inquiry type property.

nodes.name: Create Note — Existing Contact
nodes.description: Creates a HubSpot note on the existing contact record logging the full triage result.

nodes.name: Create HubSpot Contact
nodes.description: Creates a new HubSpot contact for first-time senders, then logs the triage result as a note.

nodes.name: Create Note — New Contact
nodes.description: Creates a HubSpot note on the newly created contact, logging the full triage result.

nodes.name: Merge HubSpot Paths
nodes.description: Reunites the existing-contact and new-contact paths before the Slack routing step.

nodes.name: Route to Slack Channel
nodes.description: Routes to the correct Slack channel based on route_to value: sales → #sales, account_manager → #account-management, admin → #admin.

nodes.name: Slack — #sales
nodes.description: Notifies #sales that a new email has been triaged. Includes HubSpot contact link and reminder that the Gmail draft needs review.

nodes.name: Slack — #account-management
nodes.description: Notifies #account-management that a new email has been triaged. Includes HubSpot contact link and reminder that the Gmail draft needs review.

nodes.name: Slack — #admin
nodes.description: Notifies #admin that a new email has been triaged. Includes HubSpot contact link and reminder that the Gmail draft needs review.
